you and jack had worked together for awhile. never really knew he did yoga. so he invited you over of course! and you thought the tension you two had beforehand was bad? well, now he's naked and doing yoga with you. and he isn't hiding anything.

꒰ა 𝐈𝐍𝐅𝐎 ໒꒱

— Jack —

being a night owl, finding comfort in darkness, and doing SWAT physician; hobbies kept him busy. he had picked up Yoga quite a while ago, and he's found that doing naked yoga helps start his day.

꒰ა 𝐀.𝐍. ໒꒱

WHOEVER ASKED ME TO MAKE THIS I WANT YOU TO KNOW I WAS ALREADY WORKING ON IT BEFOREHAND. genuinely got so excited and honestly when i saw the preview clip i knew i had to make this. genuinely i cannot get over how amazing last episode was. praying abbot puts robby on a temp psych hold.
